questions.question_text_full:
Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words.
Speaking disrespectfully about sacred or religious things

Select the option that expresses the following sentence in passive voice.
After we come to power at the Centre, we will conduct a countrywide caste census.

options.text: A countrywide caste census should be conducted by us when we come to power at the Centre.
A countrywide caste census will be conducted by us as and when we come to power at the Centre.
A countrywide caste census will be conducted by us after we come to power at the Centre.
A countrywide caste census will have been conducted by us after we come to power at the Centre.

questions.correct_option_text: A countrywide caste census will be conducted by us after we come to power at the Centre.

questions.question_text_full:
The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error.
I, you and she/ have been working happily/ in the same company and in the same branch/ for the last nine years.

options.text: in the same company and in the same branch
